summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Title Search & Abstracting micro-app. All 16 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI tests pass for login, order list, order detail, tab navigation, PDF download, and new order form.

issues: Party names showing as 'Unknown → Unknown' for all chain links - this appears to be a data issue from the AI parsing, not a UI bug

critical_code_review_comments: Chain of Title shows 'Unknown → Unknown' for party names - the from_party and to_party fields have empty names arrays. This is likely due to the AI parsing not extracting grantor/grantee names from the property appraiser sales history data. The real_data_fetcher.py creates documents without grantor/grantee when parsing sales_history.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded orders: Duval (5daff57e-5ab8-46c8-94f8-a5dbb3aae69a) and Hendry (dbd6a815-c66e-43e2-8c17-ceb5799d1bac)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Title Search & Abstracting features are working. Backend APIs tested: health, auth, orders list, order detail, pipeline status, documents, chain, flags, package, PDF download. Frontend tested: login, dashboard, order list with status filters, order detail page with all tabs (Overview, Documents, Chain of Title, Flags, Package), pipeline progress component, Download PDF button, new order form. The chain of title shows 'Unknown' party names which is a data extraction issue, not a UI bug.

backend_apis: GET /api/v1/apps/title-search/orders?status={filter} - 200 OK for all status filters
GET /api/v1/apps/title-search/orders/{order_id} - 200 OK with full order details
GET /api/v1/apps/title-search/orders/{order_id}/flags - 200 OK with flags array and counts
frontend_ui: Login page renders and accepts credentials
Dashboard shows Title Search & Abstracting app card
Order list page shows orders with status badges
Status filter buttons (All, Pending, Processing, Review Required, Completed, Failed) work
Order detail page shows property address, county, parcel, owner, legal description
Pipeline progress shows 100% with 6 completed stages (green checkmarks)
Report Ready action bar visible with Download PDF button
Tab navigation works: Overview, Documents, Chain of Title, Flags, Package
Documents tab shows parsed documents list with confidence scores
Chain of Title tab shows chain links (6 links, marked Complete)
Flags tab shows flags with severity badges (1 Critical, 2 Medium)
Package tab shows package details with Issue Package and Download PDF buttons
PDF download works - file downloads with correct filename
New order form renders with all required fields
Create Order button disabled until required fields filled
